strengths: Deep fullstack experience across 15+ years with strong TypeScript/Node.js alignment to primary stack, including recent NestJS-adjacent backend work at re:cinq
Demonstrated AI agent and developer tooling experience via MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — directly matches the 'AI agent development' requirement
Consistent track record in high-scale and distributed systems (Dunnhumby: millions of req/s; Optilyz: millions of mails/year) with cloud and containerization exposure (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker)
concerns: Current career gap (October 2025–present) with no stated return date or context beyond 'career gap'
React experience is present but understated — Ember.js dominates frontend history; depth in modern React ecosystem (hooks, concurrent features) is unverified
No explicit mention of Vitest, NestJS, or Kotlin/Java, which are listed as primary and secondary stack requirements
response.justification: Bogdan brings genuinely rare breadth — from embedded systems and low-latency microservices to product fullstack work and AI agent infrastructure — with a strong alignment to the role's TypeScript/Node.js core and an uncommon tick on the AI agent development requirement. The active career gap is the main uncertainty and warrants a direct conversation, but the underlying technical profile is well-matched to the seniority and responsibility scope of this role.
